creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, Jul 11, 2013 at 9:50 PM, Stephane Legrand <stephleg@free.fr> wrote:
> It seems ok now with GHC 7.6.3 and FreeBSD 9.1 -stable 64 bits (r251502).

Okay, that is great.

> I don't have anymore a 32 bits system so i can't test with this kind of
> configuration.

Actually, you can create a 32-bit jail on your 64-bit system as 64-bit
FreeBSD kernels can run 32-bit userland programs (at some extent).

Anyway, I take this resolved then.
